Product Specifications +

NSF/ANSI 42 Certified Protection: Tested and certified to remove up to 95% of chlorine, plus sediment, rust, bacteria, and microplastics as small as 5 microns.

Dual-Stage Filtration: Sediment pre-filter catches visible contaminants. Food-grade Vitamin C stage neutralizes chlorine and chemicals for softer, gentler water.

Hot Water Safe: Use with warm or hot water without damage. Perfect for washing your face, rinsing produce, or filling your kettle.

Made in Korea: Premium materials and quality control. Minimalist design that actually looks good on your faucet.

Targets: Helps block dirt, rust, bacteria, and microplastics

Installation +

5 minutes. No tools. No plumber.

Twist it onto your faucet using the included adapters. Our step-by-step guide makes it foolproof. Once it's on, just turn on your tap like normal—Glowsoft does the rest.

100% Faucet Fit Guarantee

Works with both hidden and exposed aerators. If the included adapters don't fit your faucet, we'll send custom ones free. Just snap a photo and email us at support@drwater.store — we'll handle it same-day.

Filter Life: Each cartridge lasts 4-6 weeks (varies by water quality). Replace when pressure drops or every 2 months max.

Replacements: $49/4-pack (6 months supply) • $39/4-pack on subscription (save 20%, cancel anytime)

Frequently Asked +

Q: What is hydrogen water?
It’s regular water with extra hydrogen gas (H₂) dissolved in it—just like soda has CO₂. This added H₂ provides health benefits like reduced inflammation and better energy.

Q: Isn’t hydrogen already in water? Why add more?
Water (H₂O) has hydrogen, but it’s locked to oxygen and not usable by the body. Our bottle releases free hydrogen gas that dissolves and gets absorbed.

Q: What is Tritan — and is it safe?
Absolutely. It’s FDA-approved, BPA-free, chemical-resistant, and won’t leach microplastics.

Q: Has this been certified by an independent lab?
Yes, it's H2HUBB certified and third-party tested. Download the report here.

settings.custom_liquid:
SEE FOR YOURSELF.

Tap Water’s Dirty Little Secret.

Take a look at what the Watersoft filter caught in just one month.

EFFECTS ON SKIN

Strips skin of its natural oils, leaving them damaged, dry, and irritated.

WHERE DOES IT COME FROM?

A disinfectant used to neutralize and prevent bacterial growth in your tap water.

EFFECTS ON SKIN

Irritates sensitive skin and contributes to clogged pores.

WHERE DOES IT COME FROM?

Old, aging water pipes flake off rust and other pipe materials into the water.

Source: Environmental Working Group (EWG)
EFFECTS ON SKIN

Aggravates itchy, red, or dry skin. Can infect open wounds.

WHERE DOES IT COME FROM?

Germs can grow and multiply in the pipes inside a home or building if the conditions are right.

Source: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
EFFECTS ON SKIN

Seeps into open wounds and can cause micro-abrasions.

WHERE DOES IT COME FROM?

Plastic bottles and caps used in bottled water, plastic bags, and everyday plastic breakdown.

Source: World Health Organization (WHO)

settings.custom_liquid: THE SCIENCE BEHIND HYDROGEN WATER

settings.question: 1. What's the difference between this and other filters?
settings.answer: TLDR: Puresoft Filter is safe to use in hot water. Here's the science: Hot water should never run through carbon filters (filters used by others). It will "off-load" previously trapped contaminants back into your water, potentially making your water more contaminated. 😵 But they won't tell you this or don't know the science behind it. We avoided carbon filters for this exact reason and designed our filters to be safe to use in warm water.

settings.question: 2. How long does each filter cartridge last?
settings.answer: TLDR: Usually 4 to 6 weeks. But it really depends on your water! Technically, a single cartridge can last a few months if you happen to be the lucky few who have cleaner water. From our experience, if you live in older homes/buildings or get water from wells, you may need to replace your filters more frequently. We recommend changing your filter within 2 months or when you start to lose water pressure, whichever comes first.

settings.question: 3. How much is the filter replacement?
settings.answer: TLDR: $49 for a pack of 4. But when you subscribe, it's $39 (20% off - save $10). The Cartridge Pack will last you about 6 months. We sell our filter cartridges in a pack of 4 for $49. But when you subscribe, we'll give a 20% discount ($10 off) so you only have to pay $39. You are billed every 6 months but free to modify or cancel your subscription any time. Depending on your water, a single pack could last you up to 6 months!

settings.question: 4. What does the filter remove?
settings.answer: TLDR: Dirt, Microplastics, Rust, Bacteria, Gunk, and Chlorine. The Puresoft filter is designed to maintain its effectiveness even under high water temperatures. As water flows through the filter, it first passes a 5-micron sediment layer that removes dirt, rust, bacteria, microplastics, and other gunk up to 10 times smaller than a grain of sand. At the same time, the water instantly reacts with 99.5% pure food-grade Vitamin C, which neutralizes chlorine and chloramines. This dual action ensures cleaner, safer, and more refreshing water in a single, seamless process.

settings.question: 5. Will the filter fit my faucet?
settings.answer: TLDR: Yes! We guarantee 100% faucet fit 🙌 If you need extra adapters, we'll send them free of charge ❤️ Our filter works with both hidden and exposed faucet aerators. If the provided adapters don't fit, just fill out the form from the Installation QR code that comes with your Puresoft Filter, and we'll send a custom one right away. Not sure if your faucet's compatible? Send a pic of your aerator to support@waterdoctor.co and we'll happily check for you 😊

settings.question: 6. Can I drink this water?
settings.answer: TLDR: The Puresoft Filter isn't designed for drinking. It's for washing your face and brushing your teeth. Compared to drinking from your tap water, drinking from our filter will be much cleaner. However, our filters were not designed for drinking. For drinking water filters, we'd recommend other solutions specifically designed for drinking. Feel free to reach out to us at support@waterdoctor.co if you need filter recommendations for drinking 😊

settings.question: 7. Are the replacement cartridges recyclable?
settings.answer: TLDR: Used cartridges should be disposed of as general trash after each use. Replacement cartridges, after use, are not recyclable because it's been contaminated with foreign substances from your tap water. Cartridges should be disposed of as general trash after each use.

settings.question: 8. What if I'm not satisfied? Do you have a return policy?
settings.answer: TLDR: Yes! We have a 30-day return policy. No questions asked. If you happen to live in an area with clean water or simply don't find the filter useful, we'll gladly accept your return! Just email us within 30 days, and we'll process your return and refund right away. We take customer service very seriously!

settings.question: 9. Why should I choose or trust Dr. Water?
settings.answer: Trusted by over 21,571+ customers, Dr. Water offers high-performance hydrogen water products using advanced SPE/PEM technology for maximum purity and hydrogen concentration — from 1,500 ppb in the HydroPitcher to 6,000 ppb in the Hydrator Pro — all at the best prices in the market. Our products are third-party tested, H2HUBB Certified, backed by up to a 3-year extended warranty*, and supported by dedicated customer service — delivering proven hydrogen water benefits and the best water for health.
